case_title: KESCHA MASON VS. CLYDE WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASON, KESCHA AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CLYDE PARKS, KAYLYNNE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
